changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_policy_captures_metadata to k8s_audit_policy_metadata_captured for consistency
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they relate to audit logging, which is a key feature of the Kubernetes API server. The original function names mostly follow the naming conventions, but a slight adjustment was made to ensure consistency and clarity. The functions accurately map to the FedRAMP AU-12 control requirements.
naming_improvements: Ensure consistent use of past tense in function descriptions for clarity
title: Audit Record Generation
step1_reasoning: The FedRAMP AU-12 control focuses on audit record generation, which directly maps to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes provides audit logging through the API server, allowing for detailed logging of API requests. Ensuring that audit logging is enabled, properly configured for retention, and captures necessary metadata aligns with the requirements of this control.
